objects.name: Analytic 1773
objects.description: A defender observes an application with declared microphone capability initiating microphone resource use through iOS audio frameworks, potentially during background execution or shortly after a silent wake event, followed by sustained audio capture and outbound encrypted traffic suggesting audio streaming or upload activity.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Microphone sensor activation or audio recording session initiated by application process

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Invocation of AVAudioRecorder, AVCaptureSession, or related audio capture framework calls

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application writes audio buffer or recorded audio file into application storage directories

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application transitions to background or executes while screen locked during microphone session

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application installed with NSMicrophoneUsageDescription entitlement indicating microphone capability

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Allow-list of legitimate applications expected to record audio on the device.
Time window correlating background wake events with microphone activation.
Minimum microphone recording duration considered suspicious.
Time window linking microphone activation to outbound network activity.
Threshold for outbound traffic volume indicating possible audio upload.
